normalizationSummary: Convert the real-estate market-value pack into Market Clarity templates aligned to the original Angie use case.
whyNow: This is one of the cleanest immediate product fits for the current app and should become part of the first normalized real-estate set.

candidateTemplates.name: Real Estate Market Clarity
candidateTemplates.contentGoal: Give buyers and sellers a clear, confidence-building market update.
candidateTemplates.rationale: Very close to the original Angie positioning and easy to slot into the current product promise.

candidateTemplates.name: Home Value Education
candidateTemplates.contentGoal: Explain how pricing, home value, or seller preparation works in plain English.
candidateTemplates.rationale: Adds an educational companion to the more insight-driven market-clarity post.
